creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 220721
v1

See URL for changelog. Contains a crash workaround and enables TearFree by default. Lightly tested on drm-devel-kmod + 0x1912 (Skylake) with SNA/DRI3 enabled: veloren-voxygen, vkcube-xcb, mpv --hwdec=vaapi.

Noticed via https://www.phoronix.com/scan.php?page=news_item&px=xf86-video-intel-TearFree-Def
